headline: Why Nutanix (NTNX) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of hybrid multicloud computing company Nutanix (NASDAQ:NTNX) jumped 3.2% in the afternoon session after the company highlighted significant new partnerships at its .Next 2026 conference and appeared well-positioned to benefit from customer migrations away from competitor VMware.
